languages.text: "Взгляни, Нунциус: атипичное образование в сервиторе, при этом функциональное". {n}Эоганн со свойственной ему причудливой манерой обращается к сервочерепу, деловито осматривая опухоль.{/n} "При этом сия тератома образовалась совсем недавно, но уже успела заблокировать несколько критических важных узлов управления, сковав машинный дух путами органики. Случайность или злонравный умысел?"

"Look, Nuncius: an atypical formation within the servitor, but it is functional." {n}Eogunn addresses the servo-skull in his characteristically eccentric manner, while briskly inspecting the growth.{/n} "Moreover, this teratoma is a very recent formation, yet it has already succeeded in obstructing multiple critical control nodes, binding the machine spirit in fetters of organic matter. Mere coincidence, or malevolent intent?"
languages.original_text: "Взгляни, Нунциус: атипичное образование в сервиторе, при этом функциональное". {n}Эоганн со свойственной ему причудливой манерой обращается к сервочерепу, деловито осматривая опухоль.{/n} "При этом сия тератома образовалась совсем недавно, но уже успела заблокировать несколько критических важных узлов управления, сковав машинный дух путами органики. Случайность или злонравный умысел?"

A mere coincidence, or malevolent intent?"

Mere coincidence, or malevolent intent?"

languages.text: «Mire, Nuncius: una formación atípica en el servidor, pero aún funcional». {n}Eogunn se dirige al servocráneo con su afección excéntrica característica mientras inspecciona rápidamente el bulto.{/n} «Y lo que es más, este teratoma es de formación muy reciente, pero ya ha conseguido obstruir varios nodos de control típicos, atando al espíritu máquina con cadenas de materia orgánica. ¿Es una mera coincidencia o hay una intención maligna tras esto?».
languages.original_text: "Look, Nuncius: an atypical formation within the servitor, but it is functional." {n}Eogunn addresses the servo-skull in his characteristically eccentric manner, while briskly inspecting the growth.{/n} "Moreover, this teratoma is a very recent formation, yet it has already succeeded in obstructing multiple critical control nodes, binding the machine spirit in fetters of organic matter. Mere coincidence, or malevolent intent?"

traits.locale_text: «Mire, Nuncius: una formación atípica en el servidor, pero aún funcional». {n}Eogunn se dirige al servocráneo con su afección excéntrica característica mientras inspecciona rápidamente el bulto.{/n} «Y lo que es más, este teratoma es de formación muy reciente, pero ya ha conseguido obstruir varios nodos de control típicos, atando al espíritu máquina con cadenas de materia orgánica. ¿Es una mera coincidencia o hay una intención maligna tras esto?».

languages.text: “看，努恩修斯：这机仆体内有一处非典型结构，但它居然还能正常运作。”{n}伊奥贡一边迅速地检查着那团增生组织，一边以他特有的古怪方式对伺服头骨说道：{/n}“此外，这个畸胎瘤是近期才形成的，可它已经成功阻塞了多个关键的控制节点，将机魂束缚在有机组织的枷锁之中。这是单纯的巧合，还是某种恶意行为？”
languages.original_text: "Look, Nuncius: an atypical formation within the servitor, but it is functional." {n}Eogunn addresses the servo-skull in his characteristically eccentric manner, while briskly inspecting the growth.{/n} "Moreover, this teratoma is a very recent formation, yet it has already succeeded in obstructing multiple critical control nodes, binding the machine spirit in fetters of organic matter. Mere coincidence, or malevolent intent?"

traits.locale_text: “看，努恩修斯：这机仆体内有一处非典型结构，但它居然还能正常运作。”{n}伊奥贡一边迅速地检查着那团增生组织，一边以他特有的古怪方式对伺服头骨说道：{/n}“此外，这个畸胎瘤是近期才形成的，可它已经成功阻塞了多个关键的控制节点，将机魂束缚在有机组织的枷锁之中。这是单纯的巧合，还是某种恶意行为？”

languages.text: "Seht nur, Nuncius: Eine atypische Formation im Inneren des Servitors, allerdings funktionstüchtig." {n}Eogunn spricht in seiner typischen exzentrischen Art mit dem Servoschädel, während er den Auswuchs oberflächlich untersucht.{/n} "Überdies ist dieses Teratoma eine sehr junge Formation, obschon es bereits mehrere kritische Kontrollknoten besetzt hat, die den Maschinengeist an organische Materie binden. Ein bloßer Zufall oder Böswilligkeit?"
languages.original_text: "Look, Nuncius: an atypical formation within the servitor, but it is functional." {n}Eogunn addresses the servo-skull in his characteristically eccentric manner, while briskly inspecting the growth.{/n} "Moreover, this teratoma is a very recent formation, yet it has already succeeded in obstructing multiple critical control nodes, binding the machine spirit in fetters of organic matter. Mere coincidence, or malevolent intent?"

traits.locale_text: "Seht nur, Nuncius: Eine atypische Formation im Inneren des Servitors, allerdings funktionstüchtig." {n}Eogunn spricht in seiner typischen exzentrischen Art mit dem Servoschädel, während er den Auswuchs oberflächlich untersucht.{/n} "Überdies ist dieses Teratoma eine sehr junge Formation, obschon es bereits mehrere kritische Kontrollknoten besetzt hat, die den Maschinengeist an organische Materie binden. Ein bloßer Zufall oder Böswilligkeit?"

languages.text: « Regarde, Nuncius : malgré cette formation atypique, le servitor demeure fonctionnel. » {n}Eogunn s'adresse au servocrâne avec son excentricité habituelle, tout en inspectant attentivement l'excroissance.{/n} « Et ce n'est pas tout. Bien que très récent, ce tératome a déjà réussi à obstruer plusieurs nœuds de contrôle critiques, piégeant l'esprit de la machine dans un carcan de matière organique. Simple coïncidence ou acte malveillant ? »
languages.original_text: "Look, Nuncius: an atypical formation within the servitor, but it is functional." {n}Eogunn addresses the servo-skull in his characteristically eccentric manner, while briskly inspecting the growth.{/n} "Moreover, this teratoma is a very recent formation, yet it has already succeeded in obstructing multiple critical control nodes, binding the machine spirit in fetters of organic matter. Mere coincidence, or malevolent intent?"

traits.locale_text: « Regarde, Nuncius : malgré cette formation atypique, le servitor demeure fonctionnel. » {n}Eogunn s'adresse au servocrâne avec son excentricité habituelle, tout en inspectant attentivement l'excroissance.{/n} « Et ce n'est pas tout. Bien que très récent, ce tératome a déjà réussi à obstruer plusieurs nœuds de contrôle critiques, piégeant l'esprit de la machine dans un carcan de matière organique. Simple coïncidence ou acte malveillant ? »

languages.text: "Bak Nuncius. Hizmetörün içinde atipik bir oluşum olsa da işlevsel." {n}Eogunn, karakteristik eksantrik tavrıyla hizmelete hitap ederken bir yandan da uru hızla inceliyor.{/n} "Dahası, bu teratom çok yeni bir oluşum olmasına rağmen şimdiden birden fazla kritik kontrol düğümünü engellemeyi ve makine ruhunu organik madde prangalarına bağlamayı başarmış. Bu durum tesadüf mü yoksa kötü bir niyet mi mevcut?"
languages.original_text: "Look, Nuncius: an atypical formation within the servitor, but it is functional." {n}Eogunn addresses the servo-skull in his characteristically eccentric manner, while briskly inspecting the growth.{/n} "Moreover, this teratoma is a very recent formation, yet it has already succeeded in obstructing multiple critical control nodes, binding the machine spirit in fetters of organic matter. Mere coincidence, or malevolent intent?"

traits.locale_text: "Bak Nuncius. Hizmetörün içinde atipik bir oluşum olsa da işlevsel." {n}Eogunn, karakteristik eksantrik tavrıyla hizmelete hitap ederken bir yandan da uru hızla inceliyor.{/n} "Dahası, bu teratom çok yeni bir oluşum olmasına rağmen şimdiden birden fazla kritik kontrol düğümünü engellemeyi ve makine ruhunu organik madde prangalarına bağlamayı başarmış. Bu durum tesadüf mü yoksa kötü bir niyet mi mevcut?"

languages.text: 「見てくれ、ヌンシウス。サーボの内部に異形の結節が形成されているが、機能している。」{n}エオガンは、サーボの頭部を素早く調べながら、独特の奇抜な口調でサーボ・スカルに語りかける。{/n}「この腫瘍は非常に新しいもので、複数の重要な制御ノードを阻害し、機械霊を有機物で拘束している。偶然か、それとも悪意によるのか？」
languages.original_text: "Look, Nuncius: an atypical formation within the servitor, but it is functional." {n}Eogunn addresses the servo-skull in his characteristically eccentric manner, while briskly inspecting the growth.{/n} "Moreover, this teratoma is a very recent formation, yet it has already succeeded in obstructing multiple critical control nodes, binding the machine spirit in fetters of organic matter. Mere coincidence, or malevolent intent?"
